title: Iran Nuclear Talks Stall, Raising Concerns
summary: Vance leaves Iran talks without a deal, increasing uncertainty about the future of the Iran nuclear program.

title: Hungary's Pivotal Election: Orban's Future at Stake

title: Israel Destroys Villages in Lebanon, Escalating Conflict

title: Swalwell Scandal Threatens House Expulsions

title: AI Finds Zero-Day Exploits, Sparks Emergency Meeting
